query:
SELECT id, runType, status, startedAt, completedAt,
  ROUND(durationMs / 60000, 1) AS durationMins,
  feedsFetched, feedErrors, articlesIngested, articlesDuplicate,
  articlesExtracted, projectsCreated, projectsDuplicate,
  drillingCampaignsCreated, awardedProjectsCreated,
  austenderContracts, dmirsProjects, govProjects, aemoProjects,
  projectoryEnriched, contactsEnriched, apolloCreditsUsed,
  currentStep, lastActivityNote, errors, steps
FROM pipelineRuns
WHERE id = 1230001;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT id, runType, status, startedAt, completedAt,
  ROUND(durationMs / 60000, 1) AS durationMins,
  feedsFetched, feedErrors, articlesIngested, articlesDuplicate,
  articlesExtracted, projectsCreated, projectsDuplicate,
  drillingCampaignsCreated, awardedProjectsCreated,
  austenderContracts, dmirsProjects, govProjects, aemoProjects,
  projectoryEnriched, contactsEnriched, apolloCreditsUsed,
  currentStep, lastActivityNote, errors, steps
FROM pipelineRuns
WHERE id = 1230001;
